title: Humans are being replaced by machines in the food supply chain — and it's leading to truckloads of waste
summary: A researcher explores how AI is being used to optimize food delivery, which may not always be a good thing.
author: Mohammed F. Alzuhair

title: The Iceberg ecosystem today (Anders Swanson)
summary: What can data teams realistically expect when attempting to run on top of Iceberg in production?
